articles.title: Newton Church, founded in 1893, is becoming condos
articles.description:
Once eyed as an arts center, the Church of the Open Word in Newtonville will become condos.

The post Newton Church, founded in 1893, is becoming condos appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Church of the Open Word in Newtonville will be converted into condominiums.
Founded in 1893, the church was previously considered for an arts center.
Local residents may see increased housing options in Newton as a result.

articles.title: Republicans are rushing to redraw districts before midterms. Here’s where things stand.
articles.description:
President Donald Trump has urged Republican-led states to redistrict to try to hold on to the GOP's narrow House majority in the face of political headwinds.

The post Republicans are rushing to redraw districts before midterms. Here’s where things stand. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Republicans are redrawing congressional districts ahead of the 2024 midterms to maintain House majority.
President Trump is urging GOP states to expedite redistricting efforts before the elections.
Boston residents may face changes in representation due to potential district realignments.

articles.title: Southern California chemical tank at risk of exploding as 40,000 residents are ordered to evacuate
articles.description:
Authorities are bracing for the possibility that a damaged chemical tank at a facility in Southern California could leak or explode

The post Southern California chemical tank at risk of exploding as 40,000 residents are ordered to evacuate appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities in Southern California ordered 40,000 residents to evacuate due to a chemical tank risk.
The damaged tank poses a potential leak or explosion threat, impacting nearby communities.
Boston residents should stay informed about chemical safety protocols in case of similar incidents.

articles.title: Trump says a deal with Iran and opening of Strait of Hormuz are ‘largely negotiated’
articles.description:
President Donald Trump says a deal with Iran, including opening the Strait of Hormuz, has been “largely negotiated.”

The post Trump says a deal with Iran and opening of Strait of Hormuz are ‘largely negotiated’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: President Trump claims a deal with Iran is nearly finalized, affecting global oil markets.
The Strait of Hormuz, a crucial shipping route, could reopen, impacting Boston's economy.
Local businesses may benefit from stabilized oil prices and improved trade relations.
